sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13326" key="a)ponuxistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπονῠχ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n13326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">polishing to the nail</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2023.tlg002:p.110H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
